items.title: Amazon will stop accepting new customers for Mechanical Turk
items.summary: These may be the last days of Amazon’s Mechanical Turk.

items.title: New Google commercial imagines a Declaration of Independence written with help from AI
items.summary: Two hundred and fifty years after the signing of the Declaration of Independence, a new commercial asks: What if the Founding Fathers had access to Google Works

items.title: Midjourney wants Hollywood studios to reveal the details of their AI usage
items.summary: As part of an ongoing legal dispute with three Hollywood studios, Midjourney is seeking to compel those studios to reveal how they use AI themselves.

items.title: Alibaba reportedly bans employees from using Claude Code
items.summary: Alibaba has reportedly classified Claude Code as high-risk software.

items.title: 新一轮热浪再袭法国多地 山火肆虐上万人疏散
items.summary: 中新社巴黎7月5日电 (记者 李洋)新一轮热浪5日再袭法国，多地气温将再次回升至40摄氏度。与此同时，山火继续在法国西南部肆虐，上万人被要求疏散。

items.title: 外媒：乌克兰首都基辅响起多次爆炸声
items.summary: 中新网7月6日电 据法新社报道，当地时间7月6日，乌克兰首都基辅响起多次爆炸声。

items.title: 首飞、首航、首趟！我国海陆空重大项目进度条刷新

items.title: Marine Le Pen appeal verdict: Why this moment matters for France
items.summary: The leader of France's National Rally leads the opinion polls ahead of the 2027 presidential election and will now find out if she can stand.

items.title: A global hub for fake luxury goods, Vietnam cracks down on its black market
items.summary: The Trump administration wants Vietnam to stamp out its booming counterfeit industry. Locals are divided.

items.title: Super Typhoon Bavi makes landfall on US Pacific islands with huge wind gusts
items.summary: The storm, with winds of nearly 290km/h (180mph) and gusts of 350km/h, is lashing the island of Rota.

items.title: Trump thanks Fifa for spending USA striker's ban
items.summary: Folarin Balogun is available to play for the United States in their World Cup last-16 tie against Belgium after his one-game ban is suspended by Fifa.

items.title: Eight rescued from seaplane that made 'hard landing' in Manhattan river
items.summary: Eight people were removed from the Kodiak 100 seaplane by fire department units and two had minor injures.

items.title: mekos2772/ios-location-spoofer（⭐ 1323）
items.summary: Standalone iOS app to spoof GPS location without jailbreak. Includes Shadowrocket/Surge/Loon/QX/Stash module.

items.title: HUANGCHIHHUNGLeo/claude-real-video（⭐ 945）
items.summary: Let Claude (or any LLM) actually watch a video — scene-aware, deduplicated frames + transcript, from a URL or local file. Runs locally, MIT.

items.summary: Everything I know about running LLMs locally

items.title: ammaarreshi/Generals-Mac-iOS-iPad（⭐ 787）
items.summary: Command & Conquer Generals: Zero Hour running natively on macOS, iPhone & iPad — real engine (EA GPL v3 source, via GeneralsX), DXVK/MoltenVK renderer, RTS touch controls. No game assets included.
